messages.text:
BL-507 — Pipeline board grid drops the Coordinator (CD) column: build the column set from the forward pipeline chain (specifier..QA) + not-started only, and mark a coordinator-held active ticket at the QA stage
What it solves: The Telegram Pipeline Board grid renders one column per role in PIPELINE_BOARD_COLUMN_ORDER, which is
built from ALL_SWARM_ROLES (extension/src/concierge/roleTopicMapStore.ts:
`[...PIPELINE_CHAIN, 'coordinator']`). So the grid header carries a Coordinator column (glyph "CD",
COLUMN_LABEL['coordinat…
Approval context: New tweak to the Telegram Pipeline Board (your ask 2026-07-17: "take the Coordinator column out"). What needs your sign-off is the pinned behaviour: (a) the grid drops the Coordinator ("CD") column entirely, showing a column for every forward pipeline stage specifier..QA plus the not-started (NS) c…
BL-507 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-507" (or "reject BL-507 <reason>") to act.
